title: Incredibly Modified
description: A carefully crafted Forge 1.20.1 modpack with 100+ mods that heavily modify your Minecraft experience.
body:
# **Banner**
![Incredibly Modified Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/71d948050897d36ccaf983bf5d13794476ce19c1_0.webp)

**Loader**
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
The **Incredibly Modified** modpack is supported by the **Forge** mod loader.
> To get the **Incredibly Scary** modpack click [here](https://modrinth.com/modpack/incredibly-scary).

> To get the **Incredibly Mechanised** modpack click [here](https://modrinth.com/modpack/incredibly-mechanised).

**Mods**
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
The **Incredibly Modified** modpack contains **100+ mods** that will heavily modify and enhance your Minecraft expierience.

**Features**
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
**Incredibly Modified** modpack offers:

✔️ Enhanced exploration

✔️ Enhanced caves

✔️ Shader support

✔️ New dimensions

✔️ New structures

✔️ New mechanics

✔️ New blocks

✔️ New biomes

✔️ New mobs

✔️ & much more!

**Installation**
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
> Download a Minecraft launcher of your choice ([AT Launcher](https://atlauncher.com/downloads), [Prism Launcher](https://prismlauncher.org/download/windows/), [Modrinth App](https://modrinth.com/app))

> Login to the laucher

> Search for the **Incredibly Modified** modpack

> Click install

> Choose the newest version

> You have succesfully installed it!

**Links**
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

> [SpaceOn](https://modrinth.com/user/SpaceOn) - Owner

> [Moderon](https://discord.gg/hZfz2vtjAV) - Discord
